component.name: RustyLens
component.summary: Lightweight OCR tool for the Linux desktop

description.p: RustyLens is a lightweight, open-source OCR tool for the Linux desktop. Open an image or capture a screenshot, and RustyLens extracts the text using Tesseract — with bounding-box overlays and drag-to-select word copying, similar to Google Lens.

ul.li: OCR text extraction with support for 100+ languages
Drag-to-select words on the image with Ctrl+C to copy
Bounding-box overlay highlighting recognised words
Screenshot capture mode via XDG Desktop Portal
Language selector with auto-detection of installed Tesseract packs

screenshot.caption: Image preview with OCR word-selection overlay
Screenshot capture mode with extracted text

description.p: Fix macOS CI clippy warning: collapse nested if-let in file chooser callback.
Distro-native binaries, improved installer, and human-readable language names.

ul.li: install.sh now auto-detects the distro and downloads the matching native binary tarball
Release workflow produces separate builds for Ubuntu, Arch, and Fedora
install.sh gains --update, --appimage, and --local flags
OCR language dropdown now shows human-readable names (English, Japanese, etc.)
File chooser migrated from ashpd portal to native gtk::FileDialog
MkDocs documentation site published to GitHub Pages

description.p: CI fixes for Ubuntu 24.04, clippy, macOS, and Windows build targets.
Add macOS and Windows support with native file dialogs via rfd.

ul.li: macOS file chooser uses native NSOpenPanel; screenshot uses screencapture -i
Windows file chooser uses native IFileDialog
CI and release workflow extended to macOS and Windows

description.p: Add cross-distro install script, AppImage builder, and Makefile.

ul.li: install.sh supports Arch, Debian/Ubuntu, Fedora, openSUSE, Alpine, Void Linux
build-appimage.sh automates AppImage creation with linuxdeploy
Makefile adds common developer tasks

description.p: Flatpak CI fix and code quality improvements.

ul.li: Vendor Rust dependencies before flatpak-builder to fix offline Flatpak builds
Refactor let-chain patterns to Rust 2024 syntax in portal and UI code

description.p: Fix Flatpak and AppImage CI builds.
Fix AppImage rename step when file already has correct name.
Fix Flatpak and AppImage CI builds.
Fix CI build and vendored dependency configuration.
Improved word selection, Flatpak build fixes, and GNOME 49 runtime upgrade.

ul.li: Replace drag-to-select rectangle with anchor-based range selection (Ctrl+C to copy)
Upgrade Flatpak runtime from GNOME 46 to GNOME 49
Fix Flatpak build: add LLVM SDK extension for libclang
Add Flathub-ready metadata (desktop file, metainfo, icon)
Add AppImage build support in CI
Bump Rust edition to 2024
